subject: A system and method for adaptive cloud conversation platform (US 2023/0073930 A1)

dialog.body: Adaptive cloud conversation platform that automates decisions about when and how to establish ongoing communications with consumers, using a connection management services layer to optimize the consumer-brand relationship.

meta.status: published application; grant status to be confirmed
meta.notes: Priority 2009-01-28, filed 2022-08-25, published 2023-03-09. Co-inventor Matthew DiMaria (former VHT / Mindful CEO). Shares priority chain with US 2021/0321002 A1 and US 11,665,282 B2. Published application; grant status to be confirmed.
